title: ARC UMATILLA COUNTY - 211info
text: ARC UMATILLA COUNTY ARC UMATILLA COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides connections to resources such as case management services, assistance with advocacy, disability awareness training, education, recreational programs, and vocational training. 215 W Orchard Avenue Hermiston, OR 978381738 Eligibility: Individuals who have intellectual and developmental disabilities and their families Hours: Monday 9am-noon Email (541) 567-7615 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 567-7615 Main phone Main phone (541) 567-7615 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. If needed, leave a voicemail stating name, phone number, and desired resource. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Advocacy * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Disability Awareness Training General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues Vocational Rehabilitation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ARC UMATILLA COUNTY
